name: Ararat Home Kadayif
recipeIngredient: A few drops Fresh Lemon Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut and fluff 1 lb of Kadayif dough in a bowl with hands.
2. Add half melted butter and mix until strands are evenly coated.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in a lightly buttered 17x13-inch baking pan.
4. Combine half and half and heavy cream in a large saucepan. Bring to a slow boil over low heat.
5. In a separate bowl, combine cornstarch and milk, stirring until cornstarch is dissolved.
6. Slowly add the cornstarch mixture to the cream, stirring constantly, until the mixture returns to a slow boil.
7. Spread the hot cream filling over the kadayif in the pan.
8. Cut and fluff the remaining 1 lb of Kadayif dough in a bowl. Add the remaining melted butter and mix with hands until strands are evenly coated. Spread over the top of the cream layer, pressing down firmly to form an even surface.
9. Place the pan on the lowest oven rack and bake at 450 degrees F. for about 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown. If not golden, move the pan to the top rack and bake for an additional 5 to 10 minutes.
10. Meanwhile, prepare the syrup by combining sugar and water in a saucepan. Boil for 5 to 10 minutes, then add lemon juice and cool.
11. Pour the cold syrup evenly over the kadayif as soon as it is removed from the oven.
12. Cut into squares to serve.
